description: Contribution to personal and team growth.

signals: I quickly learn from others and demonstrate a growth mindset
I consistently step up when required and embrace feedback and reflection
examples: Through pair-programming, I learned about GitHub Actions, asked questions, and integrated the new knowledge into my workflow
I embraced feedback from code reviews and incorporated it into my next pull requests

signals: I proactively support team members, helping them succeed
I share knowledge, show empathy, and foster a positive environment
examples: As an expert on React, I helped a colleague implement a new React hook, providing hands-on guidance and encouragement
I onboarded a new teammate by explaining workflows and answering questions patiently

signals: I actively mentor others, accelerating their growth through constructive feedback and positive reinforcement
I encourage reflection to help teammates integrate lessons learned
examples: I helped X become better at writing unit tests by providing feedback on code reviews, suggesting training materials, and maintaining a supportive attitude
I facilitated a conversation to resolve design disagreements with empathy and clear reasoning

signals: I coordinate team members, moderating discussions and facilitating alignment
I handle conflicts with empathy and keep the team focused on common goals
examples: When X, who led a critical project, fell sick, I immediately reorganized tasks among other team members so we could still meet our commitments
I led a design session ensuring all voices were heard and the team reached a decision

signals: I guide team members to flourish in their careers, setting goals and inspiring performance
I leverage emotional intelligence to manage conflicts, give constructive feedback, and cultivate a thriving team culture
examples: I designed a challenging but achievable professional development plan for X, offered continuous feedback, and provided encouragement, leading to significant growth in their skills and confidence
I shaped team hiring standards and designed an onboarding program that became a company best practice
